introSection:
Super 8er Bahn was a steel roller coaster located in area "Nr. 94a" of Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It was the only "FC80" roller coaster ever built.

The ride was repainted between 2013 and 2015.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Dark brown track and orange supports. The ride used to feature green track and pink supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains where of the newer style introduced in the mid-90s.

fullText:
Super 8er Bahn was a steel roller coaster located in area "Nr. 94a" of Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It was the only "FC80" roller coaster ever built.

The ride was repainted between 2013 and 2015.



Dark brown track and orange supports. The ride used to feature green track and pink supports.

The trains where of the newer style introduced in the mid-90s.
